content: @Victor Adossi as a heads-up, @Karthik Ganeshram is working on the StarlingMonkey update. I just realized that there's a risk of duplicating work here
Ah thank you for the heads up -- I wasn't working on it but I will make sure to not :)
I was just about to push out a new jco release, but maybe I'll wait until the new starlingmonkey and componentize-js release...
Should we try to get the clang analyzer fixes in before release?
@Tomasz Andrzejak I think that'd be great, yes. If you think you addressed everything from my review there, feel free to land it
Let me just go one more time through it to make sure then I will merge it.
